title: dendranthema zawadzkii var. yezoense
intro: Dendranthema zawadzkii var. yezoense, also known as Yezo aster, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Dendranthema zawadzkii var. yezoense include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
